arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford BANISHED by Ruben Amorim after outburst
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim decided to leave Rashford out of his squad for the match at Old Trafford after the attacker's controversial interview with Henry Winter earlier this week. Rashford followed up that exclusion against City - which United won 2-1 - with an interview with Henry Winter two days later where he stated that he wanted to leave the club.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford left out of Manchester United squad for third straight match
arts.sum: The homegrown forward gave an eye-catching interview, saying on Tuesday that he was “ready for a new challenge and the next steps”.

arts.ttl: Everton v Chelsea, Manchester United v Bournemouth and more: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Live updates on the matches at 2pm (GMT) Also: Fulham v Southampton and Wolves v Leicester Get in touch! Email John here | Live scores Will Unwin, who is our reporter at Leicester today, tells me that “Pereira makes his mark by starting eight native Portuguese speakers” in the Wolves team. Leicester: Ward, Justin, Coady, Vestergaard, Kristiansen, Soumare, Skipp, El Khannous, Ayew, Mavididi, Vardy. Subs: Iversen, Faes, Okoli, Winks, De Cordova-Reid, Choudhury, Daka, Thomas, Buonanotte. arts.ttl: Team News: Marcus Rashford, Alejandro Garnacho decisions made as Ruben Amorim names Man United XI vs. Bournemouth
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim names his starting side for Sunday's Premier League clash with Bournemouth at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Rashford out of Manchester United squad again amid Saudi interest
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has again not been included in the Manchester United squad to face Bournemouth this afternoon. Rashford was dropped from the squad for the derby win at Manchester City last weekend and also missed out during the Carabao Cup defeat at Tottenham on Thursday. Last week, Rashford suggested he was keen to leave the […] The post Rashford out of Manchester United squad again amid Saudi interest first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Bournemouth today with game not on TV
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to build on their derby day win over Manchester City when they host Bournemouth in the Premier League - but the clash will not be shown on TV

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay takes another Man Utd star to Napoli
arts.sum: Maguire's future at Man Utd has been very much in doubt as his contract expires at the end of the season, and he fell down the centre back pecking order under former manager Ten Hag. According to The Athletic, Napoli are considering making a move for Harry Maguire in 2025 as they have been buoyed by the success of his former Man Utd teammate McTominay.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told the four Man Utd players to build around including new captain
arts.sum: Teddy Sheringham has named four Manchester United players that Ruben Amorim should build his new team around.

arts.ttl: Man United could complete sensational Marcus Rashford swap to correct summer transfer mistake
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford continues to be linked with a move away from Manchester United ahead of the transfer window

arts.ttl: Man Utd plot post-season trip to comply with Premier League financial regulations
arts.sum: Man Utd are currently planning a financially rewarding post-season friendly tour in Malaysia.
